description: Daisy, Simmons, and several agents struggle to escape while the base is flooded with sleeping gas, the LMDs are destroyed, and bodies are moved to safety. May reveals to Coulson LMD that her decision was made by her own will, affirming her humanity before self-destruction. Daisy and Simmons, wounded but alive, prepare the hardware for their next move.

transcript.line: You were right. Our programming is different. Are you afraid to die? ‘Cause I am. I know I'm not real. I'm all phantom limbs. But that doesn't make the pain less real.
You don't have to feel pain.
You say you don't anymore. But that pain, that regret, that's what made you a person, a person I love.
Come on, go, go, go, go, go!
My programming was to get the Darkhold. That came from Radcliffe. But my impulse, to keep Coulson safe and close, that desire, that came from me.
And I'm sorry to say, you're not him.
